input: In the eval_sales database, what is the total revenue per product category across all orders? Which category is the largest?
context: eval_sales.orders joined to eval_sales.products on product_id, then SUM(line_total) GROUP BY category.

Services wins because the synthetic price range for that category is the widest ($1k–$10k). Substring check pins on the category name; LLM judge will assess whether the agent gave a faithful breakdown.

input: Joining eval_sales.orders to eval_sales.customers, which region has the highest total order revenue?
context: orders ⋈ customers on customer_id, then SUM(line_total) GROUP BY region.
EMEA wins because the customer-region distribution is weighted 50% EMEA / 30% AMER / 20% APAC and orders are uniformly assigned.
